backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the asset management backend with functions to submit, update, delete, and query assets, including aggregations by category and condition per location.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two features: a GPS capture bug fix in AssetEntryForm.tsx and a delete asset capability added to AdminDashboard.tsx with confirmation dialog and toast notifications.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Inventory Asset Verification' that mounts the app at the #root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /entry, /admin), wraps them in the Layout shell, and includes a Toaster and AddToHomeScreenPrompt.
frontend/src/components/AddToHomeScreenP: Mobile-only prompt component that detects iOS/Android and displays platform-specific instructions for adding the app to the home screen, with a dismissal mechanism backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/components/AssetEntryForm.t: Asset verification form component that captures GPS coordinates from the resolved promise (not React state) and submits asset data with photos to the backend or queues it offline.
frontend/src/components/AssetFilters.tsx: Renders a filter panel for assets with search, location, condition, and date range inputs. Exposes a FilterState interface and a clear-all button when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/AssetTable.tsx: Displays a paginated list (20 items) of assets as clickable cards with thumbnail, condition badge, location, and timestamp. Shows an empty state when no assets match.
frontend/src/components/GPSDisplay.tsx: Renders GPS coordinates in either a compact inline link or a full card with lat/lon, accuracy, and a Google Maps link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header, bottom navigation bar (Verify Asset / Dashboard), and an offline sync indicator.
frontend/src/components/OfflineSyncIndic: Shows online/offline status and pending sync count, with buttons to trigger or retry sync using the useOfflineSync hook.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: Handles multi-photo capture and upload with image compression, a grid preview, per-photo removal, and a configurable max-photo limit.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines a static list of asset category options (id, name, icon) and a helper to look up a category name by id.
frontend/src/constants/locations.ts: Defines a static list of location options (id, name, address) and a helper to look up a location name by id.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: React hook that wraps the browser Geolocation API, exposing a `capture` function that returns a promise with latitude, longitude, and accuracy, plus loading/error state and a `reset` helper.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context/hook providing Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, clear, identity, and status state to the component tree through `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineSync.ts: React hook that manages offline queue synchronization, tracking online status and automatically flushing queued asset checks to the backend actor when connectivity is restored.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of TanStack Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for assets, including queries for fetching/exporting assets and mutations for submitting checks, updating status, and deleting assets.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, configuring Tailwind with a deep-slate/amber industrial OKLCH color theme, and defining utility component classes like status badges and field cards.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying a filterable, sortable asset table with a detail drawer showing photos and metadata, plus CSV export and delete functionality with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/AssetEntryPage.tsx: Simple page component that renders a header and the `AssetEntryForm` for field technicians to submit physical asset verification entries.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for AssetVerify app displaying a hero section, quick-action links to the asset entry form and admin dashboard, and a feature highlights grid (GPS, photo, offline, tamper-proof).
frontend/src/services/offlineQueue.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed queue of asset verification submissions for offline use, providing add, getAll, remove, count, and clear operations.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions to convert Asset records to RFC 4180-compliant CSV format and trigger a browser file download named with today's date.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility functions to convert bigint nanosecond timestamps (from the ICP backend) to human-readable date, time, and datetime strings, plus helpers to convert Date objects to nanoseconds.
frontend/src/utils/imageCompression.ts: Compresses and resizes an image File using an HTML canvas, returning a base64 JPEG string with configurable max dimensions and quality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color palettes (amber, slate, semantic tokens), custom font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 11) describing the AssetVerify app's features, architectural notes, known issues, and versioned feature list for build planning.
